final:
module edge_detect (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst_n,
    input wire a,
    output reg rise,
    output reg down
);

reg b_c;  // Delayed version of 'a' to detect edges

always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
        b_c <= 1'b0;
        rise <= 1'b0;
        down <= 1'b0;
    end else begin
        rise <= 1'b0;
        down <= 1'b0;
        
        if (a && !b_c) begin
            rise <= 1'b1;  // Rising edge detected
        end
        if (!a && b_c) begin
            down <= 1'b1;  // Falling edge detected
        end
        b_c <= a;  // Update delayed signal
    end
end

endmodule
